title: Eternity-MC
description: Eternity made for the Eternity SMP server is a modpack perfectly balanced between a Vanilla and Modded Experience. Featuring Farmers Delight, Create, Yungs Mods. Macaws Mods and Various Decorative Mods.
body:
Eternity is a chill modpack made for the Eternity SMP server, striking a sweet spot between Vanilla Minecraft and modded fun. It keeps things familiar while adding just enough to make everything feel fresh and exciting.

You’ve got Farmer’s Delight for all your cooking needs, Create to build some awesome contraptions, YUNG’s Mods to spice up world gen, and Macaw’s Mods plus a bunch of decorative stuff to make your builds look amazing.

Whether you’re here to explore, build, automate, or just vibe with friends, Eternity gives you the tools to play your way, without going too over the top.
